The '''Cleansing of Onderon''' was one of the first skirmishes of the [[Great Hunt (Jedi)|Great Hunt]]. In it, [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] led by [[Guun Han Saresh]], [[Shaela Nuur]], and [[Duron Qel-Droma]] cleansed the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Onderon/Legends|Onderon]] of [[Terentatek/Legends|terentateks]] left there by the [[Brotherhood of the Sith]] during the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War's]] [[Krath Holy Crusade]].

==Appearances==
